ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the county data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "housing_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the housing unit data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the housing unit data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_disparities" (
  "disparity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing disparity entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "raw_testing_disparity" REAL /* Raw testing disparity in the county */,
  "smoothed_testing_disparity" REAL /* Smoothed testing disparity in the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the testing disparity data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the testing disparity data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disparity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_disparities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radon_levels" (
  "radon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radon level entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "raw_mean_radon_level" REAL /* Raw mean radon level in the county */,
  "smoothed_mean_radon_level" REAL /* Smoothed mean radon level in the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the radon level data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the radon level data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radon_levels_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_counts" (
  "test_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test count entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "raw_test_count" INTEGER /* Raw test count in the county */,
  "smoothed_test_count" REAL /* Smoothed test count in the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test count data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the test count data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_counts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being audited */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being updated */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
